context_for_next_testing_agent: Emoji picker and reactions feature fully implemented. Test user doesn't have access to test booking eb3ab6be-394a-44ce-86e7-215251b6b2d0. To test reactions, need a user who is a participant in a booking.

features_verified.GET_quick_actions: VERIFIED - Returns 14 quick actions in 4 categories
features_verified.POST_message_react: VERIFIED - Endpoint exists and validates emoji (returns 400 for invalid emoji)
features_verified.Emoji_picker_UI: VERIFIED - Opens via Smile button, has 4 categories (Surf, Reactions, Faces, Gestures)
features_verified.Emoji_picker_categories: VERIFIED - All 4 categories visible and clickable
features_verified.Emoji_insertion: VERIFIED - Clicking emoji inserts into input field
features_verified.Reaction_picker_UI: VERIFIED - Plus button on messages opens reaction picker
features_verified.Reaction_display: VERIFIED - Reactions display below messages with count
features_verified.WebSocket_reaction_update: VERIFIED - Code handles reaction_update events for real-time sync
features_verified.Reactions_in_messages: VERIFIED - Messages include reactions field in API response

code_review_notes.CrewChat.js: Well-structured component with proper state management for emoji picker and reactions. WebSocket handling for real-time reaction updates is correctly implemented.
code_review_notes.crew_chat.py: Backend endpoints properly validate emoji against allowed list. Reactions stored as JSON dict with emoji as key and user_id array as value.
code_review_notes.models.py: CrewChatMessage.reactions field correctly defined as JSON column with default empty dict.
